title: urceola esculenta
intro: Urceola esculenta, also known as the Asian cat's whisker or Chinese cat's whisker, is a medicinal plant native to Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues like bronchitis and asthma. Urceola esculenta is often prepared as a tea or decoction, and its roots are used in herbal preparations, including infusions and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties.
